Off Calendar Sep-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on FRI-SEP-09-2016:
David P. Nemecek, Jr., Esq. of BEUGELMANS, LLP (T: 415.856.9174) appearing telephonically on behalf of Defendant LAUREN FEDERGREEN who is present in open court;
David Sternfeld, Esq. (T: 510.763.8015) appears on behalf of Defendant ROCHELLE FEDERGREEN who is not present.

Defendant Lauren Federgreen's Ex Parte Application Extending Deadline to File Proposed Statement of Decision is argued and GRANTED.

The Court instructs Mr. Nemecek to meet and confer with his client. Mr. Nemecek has not filed a motion to be relieved as counsel for Defendant Lauren Federgreen.

The Court sets a new date of Friday, September 23, 2016 for Mr. Nemecek to file a proposed statement of decision. The Court has received a proposed statement of decision lodged by
Mr. Sternfeld (on September 2, 2016). If a proposed statement of decision is not filed by
Mr. Nemecek, this matter will be deemed taken under submission on September 23, 2016.
Prevailing party to prepare and submit a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
